title: FabHotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: FabHotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, FabHotels in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!
